chunks.title: God's Call to Justice
chunks.reason: Introduction of God speaking from Zion with cosmic imagery.

chunks.title: Instruction on True Worship
chunks.reason: God addresses His people regarding the nature of sacrifice and thanksgiving.

chunks.title: Reproof of the Wicked
chunks.reason: God contrasts the wicked's behavior with His silence and impending judgment.

chunks.title: Final Warning and Promise
chunks.reason: Concluding call to remember God and the promise of salvation for the righteous.
